Tests LanguageModel renamed API surfaces and deprecation issues
LanguageModel deprecation issue found: LanguageModel_InputQuota
LanguageModel deprecation issue found: LanguageModel_InputUsage
LanguageModel deprecation issue found: LanguageModel_MeasureInputUsage
LanguageModel deprecation issue found: LanguageModel_OnQuotaOverflow
Test Results: {
    results : {
        inputQuotaExists : true
        inputUsageExists : true
        measureInputUsageExists : true
        onquotaoverflowExists : true

}
